Companies that help dispute errors and negative items on your credit reports to improve your score.

Personal Loans

Debt Relief

Debt settlement and management companies that negotiate with creditors to reduce what you owe.

Browse all

Credit Cards

Credit cards designed for credit building, balance transfers, and rewards.

Browse all

Credit Monitoring

Services that track your credit score and alert you to changes on your credit reports.

Credit Counseling

Non-profit and for-profit organizations offering financial education and debt management plans.

How It Works

Four steps to finding the right credit repair company.

1

Browse

Explore 200+ credit repair companies with honest reviews, pricing breakdowns, and BBB ratings.

2

Compare

Use side-by-side comparisons to see how companies stack up on features, pricing, and guarantees.

3

Choose

Read our diagnosis for each company to find the one that matches your credit situation and budget.

4

Apply

Click through to the company website to sign up. Many offer free consultations to get started.

CreditDoc

Expert reviews and comparisons to help you find the right credit repair, personal loan, and debt relief services.
